name: SAL Triage (Sort, Assess, Lifesaving Interventions, Treatment/Transport)
description: Casu triage protocollo Missae. Standard for multi-casualty events in military and civilian settings.
instructions: Gradus 1: Global species (ambulatio, iactatio, adhuc). Gradus II: Assident in ordine prioritatis. Gradus 3: Facere interventus vitales (sanguinem maiorem, aerem apertum, acum decompressionem, auto-injectores). Gradus IV: genus assignare.

categories.label: Expectant/Deceased
categories.description: Verisimile superesse datas facultates, vel confirmari defuncti

categories.label: Immediata (T1)
categories.description: Laesiones vita-minaces, interventu praesenti superstes erit

categories.label: Moratus (T2)
categories.description: Laesiones graves sed stabiles possunt expectare curam

categories.label: Expectant
categories.description: Laesio indeprecabilis data opum current -- solatium cura sola

pediatric.note: SalireSTART triagium algorithmus sal pro aegris pediatricis mutat. Rate respiratorii liminum et gradus taxatio pro pueris sub VIII differunt.

source: SALT Mass Casualty Triage (CDC/CHEMPACK), JTS CPG
